title: I'm like, I guess the have the fucking census police.
content:
I'm like, I guess the have the fucking census police.

But it was a big thing, especially, you know, back then, you know, like in the early 1900s, because so many immigrants were coming here from everywhere.

But in the whole, I found the report for the building.

Every person in the whole building was Italian.

Every person in the whole building.

And every person in the whole building did some sort of construction.

Look, we self segregate.

It always looks it is always like that.

Like, you always go when you move somewhere, you live it's the exact same people.

It's still like nowads, right?

They can Brooklyn,hat, all this. Stuff.

In New York, it is.

That's what I was explaining to the girl that says my nails.

I was like, New York is a very segregated place.

It's weirdly segregated.

Where I grew up was really bad.
